title: Add fullscreen hamburger menu overlay with navigation links

requirements.text: Update the Navbar component to include a fullscreen overlay menu that opens when the hamburger icon is clicked on any screen size (not just mobile). The fullscreen overlay should cover the entire viewport with a dark/glassmorphism background matching the site's cinematic theme. Inside the overlay, display large navigation links: Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, and Contact — each smooth-scrolling to the respective section. Include an animated close button (X) to dismiss the overlay. The open/close transition should use smooth animated entrance/exit effects (e.g. fade-in + slide or scale). The existing desktop navigation links in the navbar should remain visible alongside the hamburger icon trigger.

quotes: i want hamburger menu in the full screen also in that hamburger i want Services Portfolio Pricing Testimonials Contact

acceptanceCriteria: A hamburger icon is visible and clickable on all screen sizes in the navbar
Clicking the hamburger icon opens a fullscreen overlay covering the entire viewport
The fullscreen overlay displays navigation links: Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, and Contact
Each link in the fullscreen overlay smoothly scrolls to the corresponding section and closes the overlay
A visible close (X) button dismisses the fullscreen overlay
The overlay open/close transition includes a smooth animated effect (fade, slide, or scale)
The overlay background uses the site's dark cinematic theme (deep charcoal/glassmorphism styling)
The existing desktop navbar links remain visible when the overlay is closed

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Preserve all existing smooth-scroll behavior and section IDs
Maintain the existing cinematic dark theme and visual design consistency
nonGoals: Adding new page sections or routes
Changing the desktop navbar layout beyond adding the hamburger icon trigger
Adding authentication or login to the menu
